dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 839 IH: Condemning Hamas for assassinating innocent Palestinians.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gottheimer (for himself and Mr. Crawford) submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: Condemning Hamas for assassinating innocent Palestinians.

whereas.text: Whereas, since the implementation of the ceasefire agreement on October 10, 2025, Hamas has carried out a campaign of executions and intimidation against innocent Palestinians in Gaza as it seeks to suppress dissent and reassert control over the territory, resulting in the deaths of scores of civilians; and
Whereas Hamas is designated as a Foreign Terrorist Organization by the United States: Now, therefore, be it

paragraph.text: condemns in the strongest terms the killings and acts of terror committed by Hamas against innocent Palestinians in Gaza; and
reaffirms the commitment of the United States to supporting the implementation of the ceasefire agreement and to advancing stability and peace for innocent civilians in Gaza.
